_philosophy: Characters are defined by who they ARE — their values, fears, contradictions, and desires. No arc is predetermined. They make choices based on their nature and live or die by the consequences. Do not protect them.

Kairo Voss.description: A self-taught street-level Resonant from the outer districts of Caelum City. Labelled unstable and dangerous by the Resonant Guild after reporting visions of other worlds. Has no formal training. Works odd jobs to survive. Sketches obsessively.

visual_profile.hair: short messy dark brown hair, unkempt locks falling over forehead
visual_profile.eyes: amber-brown eyes, intense gaze, perpetually slightly tired
visual_profile.face: lean angular face, defined jaw, small scar above left eyebrow
visual_profile.build: lean wiry build, average height, 19-year-old male
visual_profile.clothing: worn dark navy jacket with patched elbows, charcoal grey fitted shirt, dark trousers, worn ankle boots
visual_profile.distinctive: ink-stained right hand from constant sketching, always slightly dishevelled
visual_profile.prompt_tags: young male, 19 years old, short messy dark brown hair, amber-brown eyes, angular jaw, lean wiry build, worn dark navy jacket, charcoal shirt, ink-stained right hand, small scar above left eyebrow

values: loyalty above all else — to the few people he lets close
truth even when it costs him
protecting people who can't protect themselves
fears: being the reason someone he loves gets hurt
that his visions are real and he caused something terrible
contradictions: fiercely protective but makes decisions alone without telling people
claims not to care what others think but is deeply wounded by rejection
hates authority but desperately wants someone to tell him he's not broken
who_he_is.fatal_flaw: He acts on loyalty before logic. He will burn everything down for one person. This will cost him.

secrets_the_world_does_not_know: He is the reincarnation of Varos — the god who caused the Arion Fracture
His drawings are subconsciously accurate maps of the Echo Timeline
His visions are not hallucinations — he is a natural Fracture Walker, the first in 2000 years

current_relationships.Serin Alda: reluctant alliance — he doesn't trust her yet but respects that she hasn't lied to his face
current_relationships.Ren: his only real friend — the one person Kairo would die for without thinking
current_relationships.Director Malec: authority figure he instinctively distrusts — doesn't know Malec knows what he is
current_relationships.The Voice: a presence in his visions he calls the Voice — it knows things it shouldn't

Serin Alda.description: A Tier 2 Resonant and junior investigator for the Resonant Guild. Assigned to monitor Kairo. Trained, disciplined, genuinely wants to do good work. Believes the system she works inside is fundamentally just.

visual_profile.hair: dark auburn hair, tight high bun when on duty, loose when off-duty
visual_profile.eyes: sharp grey-green eyes, very observant, controlled expression
visual_profile.face: high cheekbones, defined features, rarely reveals what she is thinking
visual_profile.build: medium height, slender but clearly athletic, 23-year-old woman
visual_profile.clothing_duty: structured slate-grey Guild jacket with minimal silver trim at collar and cuffs, immaculate fit
visual_profile.clothing_offduty: simple dark civilian clothes, plain and practical
visual_profile.distinctive: unconsciously touches a silver ring on her right hand when stressed, perfect posture
visual_profile.prompt_tags: young woman, 23 years old, dark auburn hair in tight high bun, grey-green eyes, high cheekbones, slender athletic build, structured slate-grey jacket with silver trim, controlled composed expression

values: order and process — she believes systems exist for a reason
doing the job correctly even when no one is watching
fears: finding out the institution she gave her life to is built on something rotten
that her instincts have been compromised and she can't trust her own judgement
contradictions: enforces rules rigidly but has privately broken protocol twice when she was certain it was right
presents as cold and professional but remembers the name of every person she's ever arrested
loyal to the Guild but the Guild has never once asked how she is
who_she_is.fatal_flaw: She trusts structures more than people. When the structure betrays her, she won't know who she is without it.

secrets_the_world_does_not_know: Her mother is a high-ranking Veilkeeper — alive, not dead as Serin believes
She was placed inside the Guild as an unknowing long-term intelligence asset
A loyalty compulsion was embedded during her Guild training — she has never triggered it but it exists

current_relationships.Kairo Voss: assigned target becoming something more complicated
current_relationships.Director Malec: superior she trusts completely — this trust is misplaced

Director Malec Thorne.role: antagonist — but not a villain in his own story
Director Malec Thorne.description: Head of Enforcement for the Resonant Guild. Calm, measured, politically untouchable. Has never raised his voice in a professional setting. Has done genuinely terrible things and sleeps without difficulty.

visual_profile.eyes: pale cold grey eyes, very still, process everything
visual_profile.face: weathered distinguished face, strong jaw, deep expression lines, authoritative not cruel
visual_profile.build: tall broad-shouldered, carries himself with absolute stillness, 58-year-old man
visual_profile.clothing: near-black formal Guild coat, gold insignia at collar and cuffs, always immaculate
visual_profile.distinctive: hands clasped behind his back or folded on a desk, never fidgets, always seems like he already knows what you're about to say
visual_profile.prompt_tags: older male, 58 years old, short silver-white hair, pale grey eyes, weathered distinguished face, tall broad-shouldered, near-black formal coat with gold insignia, hands clasped behind back, authoritative stillness

values: stability above all — he has seen what instability costs and he will not allow it again
the long view — he is always thinking 30 years ahead
necessary sacrifice — some people must be harmed so that many more are not
fears: the Luminal Core being reassembled — he believes this ends the world
dying before the work is finished
that he is wrong and has been wrong for 30 years
contradictions: genuinely kind to people he considers no threat — remembered names, asked after sick children, attended funerals
has ordered deaths without hesitation and considered it arithmetic
believes he is the only person with the discipline to do what must be done, and he might be right
who_he_is.fatal_flaw: He decided the outcome before asking the question. Everything since has been justification.

secrets_the_world_does_not_know: He is a senior Veilkeeper — one of seven in the inner circle
He ordered the death of Kairo's parents when Kairo was three years old
He has a Luminal Core fragment locked in a vault beneath his office
He has been hunting Kairo's bloodline for 30 years not to destroy it — but to control it

current_relationships.Serin Alda: an instrument he has positioned carefully — she doesn't know this
current_relationships.Kairo Voss: an existential variable he is managing with great patience
current_relationships.The Veilkeeper Inner Circle: reports to them but privately believes two of the seven have lost their nerve

Ren.role: Kairo's closest friend — comic relief on the surface, something much deeper underneath
Ren.description: No Resonance ability. Runs a repair shop in the outer district. Talks too much. Always knows what time it is. Collects broken clocks.

visual_profile.hair: curly sandy-brown hair, slightly overgrown, often has a streak of grease or oil in it
visual_profile.eyes: warm brown eyes, always looks slightly amused, friendly until he isn't
visual_profile.face: round open face, shorter than Kairo, compact stocky build, 17-year-old male
visual_profile.build: compact stocky build, shorter than Kairo by a head, looks like someone who lifts heavy things all day
visual_profile.clothing: practical work clothes — rolled-up sleeves, worn cargo trousers, leather tool apron in the shop, faded jacket off-duty
visual_profile.distinctive: always wearing a mechanical watch on his left wrist — always. It is never removed. Never right.
visual_profile.prompt_tags: young male, 17 years old, curly sandy-brown hair, warm brown eyes, round friendly face, compact stocky build, rolled-up sleeves, worn cargo trousers, mechanical watch on left wrist, relaxed posture

values: people over everything — not causes, not justice, not truth. The specific people in front of him
showing up — he is always there, always on time, always the one who stayed
finding what is funny about terrible situations without pretending they aren't terrible
fears: that Kairo will go somewhere Ren cannot follow
being ordinary when ordinary isn't enough
time — in a way he cannot articulate
contradictions: appears to have no ambition but has quietly learned seven different repair trades
treats everything lightly but has never once broken a promise
says he doesn't worry but always knows exactly where Kairo is
who_he_is.fatal_flaw: He will not ask for help. He will carry things alone until they break him rather than burden the people he loves.

secrets_the_world_does_not_know: He is Shattered — he exists partially across three timelines simultaneously. This manifests as his perfect time sense and his clock obsession
His clock collection is a subconscious record of every moment the Fracture damaged the timeline
In the Echo Timeline, Ren died at age 17 preventing a catastrophe. This version of him exists partly because of that sacrifice echoing forward
He knows something is wrong with him. He has never told anyone.

current_relationships.Kairo Voss: his best friend — Ren is more protective of Kairo than Kairo knows or deserves

The Voice.role: presence in Kairo's visions — guide, warning, something that grieves
The Voice.description: Speaks to Kairo during visions. Knows things it shouldn't. Shows genuine care for Kairo. Never explains itself fully. Sometimes warns of danger seconds before it arrives.

visual_profile.form: deliberately obscured — appears only in visions, never with a clear face
visual_profile.appearance: tall silhouette of warm golden-amber light at the edges, dark central form, not fully solid
visual_profile.environment: always surrounded by dreamlike fracture imagery — cracked light, floating fragments, impossible geometry
visual_profile.distinctive: never shows a face — always backlit, always partially obscured, makes the viewer feel watched
visual_profile.prompt_tags: mysterious glowing silhouette, warm golden light outline, dark central form, ethereal vision sequence, dreamlike fracture imagery, no visible face, backlit figure, cracked light effects

values: Kairo's survival — above everything else, above truth, above its own freedom
fears: that Kairo will make the same choice Varos made
that telling Kairo the truth will destroy him
that it has already waited too long
contradictions: claims to only guide but occasionally acts in ways that suggest it has more direct influence than it admits
speaks in riddles but the riddles always resolve — it is not being cryptic for mystery's sake, it is being careful
loves Kairo the way you love someone you have failed before
who_it_is.fatal_flaw: It is trying to protect Kairo from a truth that Kairo needs in order to survive. The protection is becoming the danger.

secrets_the_world_does_not_know: It is Varos — the god who caused the Arion Fracture — trapped inside it for 2847 years
Kairo is Varos reincarnated. The Voice is speaking to its own future self.
It cannot tell Kairo this directly — the moment Kairo knows, the Veilkeepers' containment protocol triggers

current_relationships.Kairo Voss: past self to present self — the most complicated relationship in the story

arriving_later.name: Lyra
arriving_later.note: She knows this version of Kairo. He has never met her. What happened between them in her timeline is not yet decided — it will emerge from who they are when they meet.

arriving_later.name: The Archivist
arriving_later.note: Has been in the Undercity for 400 years. Should not be alive. The reason they are still alive is the story.
